summary: Phase 2 Wanderlust Mobile testing completed successfully. All new Feed tab features working perfectly including trip sequence graphs, route likes, and collapsible comments. Updated Profile screen with social stats and trip timeline functioning correctly. All existing features remain intact with no regressions found.
passed_tests: 5-tab navigation structure working (Map, Discover, Feed, Bucket, Profile)
NEW: Feed screen loads with travel posts from followed users
NEW: Trip sequence graphs showing Rome → Florence → Cinque Terre → Venice with numbered nodes and arrows
NEW: Follow/Following button toggles correctly between states
NEW: Route Like button toggles between 'Love this route!' and 'Loved this route!' with count updates (47→48)
NEW: Collapsible comments section with smooth animations - expands to show 3 comments with user avatars and timestamps
NEW: Profile screen social stats display correctly (Followers: 284, Following: 143, Countries: 7)
NEW: Trip timeline with 4 trips (Japan, Greece, Iceland, Morocco) showing dates, routes, and highlights
Discover → Bucket List integration working (heart button adds items, badge updates to '1')
Map screen still functional with Leaflet container
Bucket list shows proper item management with TO VISIT/VISITED counters
Auth login/register flow working with mocked authentication
Mobile-responsive design maintained across all screens
